name: Celestino's Rice Balls
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Canned tomato sauce or puree
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pot, cook rice in chicken broth to cover, adding more broth as it is absorbed until all chicken broth is used and rice is tender. Let rice stand 10 minutes to absorb excess moisture.
2. Add egg yolks and Parmesan cheese. Season to taste with salt. Mix well. Set aside to cool.
3. In a skillet, saute shallots with veal in butter until veal is crumbly and browned.
4. Add white wine and simmer until wine is absorbed.
5. Add nutmeg, peas, and tomato sauce. Season to taste with salt and pepper if needed.
6. Simmer for a few minutes until liquid is absorbed.
7. Set aside mozzarella cheese and egg in a small bowl.
8. Roll 2 tablespoons of cooked rice into a ball. Make a cavity in the ball and insert a scant tablespoon of veal mixture, then a small amount of mozzarella cheese and egg mixture.
9. Cover with another tablespoon of rice and seal the cavity to make a ball or pyramid shape.
10. Dip the rice ball in egg and roll in bread crumbs.
11. Heat 1 1/2 inches olive oil in a skillet to 400°F.
12. Add rice balls, few at a time, to avoid overcrowding the pan.
13. Fry until golden brown on all sides, about 3 minutes, turning often to brown evenly.
